name: legacy-subject
subject: Add Wave 3 execution substrate
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: uppercase-type
subject: FEAT: add resolver
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: unsupported-type
subject: security: harden workflow
expected: unsupported commit type 'security'; allowed types: feat, fix, refactor, perf, docs, test, build, ci, chore, revert, style

name: malformed-separator
subject: fix(governance) reject malformed subject
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: empty-scope
subject: fix(): retain evidence
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: whitespace-only-scope
subject: fix(   ): retain evidence
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: missing-description-and-space
subject: fix:
expected: commit subject must match '<type>[optional scope][!]: <description>'; see CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits

name: whitespace-only-description
subject: fix:
expected: commit description must contain non-whitespace text

name: fixup-prefix
subject: fixup! docs: explain contributor workflow
expected: commit subject must not use fixup! or squash! prefixes

name: squash-prefix
subject: squash! feat(records): add canonical records
expected: commit subject must not use fixup! or squash! prefixes

name: merge-commit
subject: chore: reconcile branches
expected: pull request history must not contain merge commits

name: octopus-merge
subject: chore: reconcile several branches
expected: pull request history must not contain merge commits
